$schema: Machine-readable feature state tracker. Source of truth for status; per-feature MD docs are source of truth for design/runtime.

policy.definition_of_done: implementation complete + verify-done passed + feature MD updated + brain coherent

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Email/password auth with role-based access (user/admin) and ban system, Better Auth + D1 + Drizzle.
features.evidence: shipped 2026-05-07; tests: app/repositories/__tests__/user.test.ts; e2e gap noted

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin-only area at /admin/* for user management and analytics; data-side gating via adminProcedure.
features.evidence: shipped 2026-05-07; known gap: layout has no loader auth gate (data-side only)

features.name: File Upload
features.description: Server-side multipart upload to Cloudflare R2 via /api/upload-file using BucketRepository.

features.name: Analytics
features.description: Read-only admin analytics at /admin: user growth, role + verification distribution, recent signups.
features.evidence: shipped 2026-05-07; AnalyticsRepository runs queries with Effect.all unbounded concurrency

features.name: Preview Deployments
features.description: Per-PR preview deployments on Cloudflare Workers: dedicated `preview` wrangler environment (isolated worker/D1/R2/workflow) + GitHub Actions workflow uploading versions with `--preview-alias pr-<N>` for stable preview URLs.
features.evidence: shipped 2026-07-11; live-verified: per-PR D1 (pr-999 binding test), alias URL auth signup 200 on pr-test, prod signup 200; run note .brain/features/preview-deployments/runs/2026-07-10-preview-deployments.md; workflows .github/workflows/preview.yml + preview-cleanup.yml

features.name: Feature Verification
features.description: feature-verifier sub-agent drives the live app via the Playwright CLI (throwaway headless script), screenshots the golden + one error path, and writes a per-feature verdict doc. Replaces per-feature e2e specs; thin CI smoke specs remain the regression net.
features.evidence: shipped 2026-07-13; self-verified: .brain/features/authentication/verifications/2026-07-13.md (PASS); harness-check 11/11; hardened clean-browser launch after dry-run extension artifact; agent .claude/agents/feature-verifier.md
